extortion.description: Inteleca has become a trusted partner in providing enterprise organizations with infrastructure and architecture design, hardware procurement, and maintenance services, excelling in the design ofvendor-neutral solutions as well as cutting-edge Optical Networking Solutions. We are ready to upload more than 100 GB of private corporate documents including: NDAs, license agreements, internal financial documents, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, SSNs, HR information, a lot of git project and source code files etc.
